title: croton laniflorus
intro: Croton laniflorus, also known as the hairy croton or hairy leaf croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton laniflorus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Croton laniflorus is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
